name: Langflow
description: Visual builder for AI agents and workflows — drag-and-drop graphs compiled to REST endpoints. Every flow becomes an MCP server. pip install langflow. 148k stars.

skills.name: Visual Workflow Builder
skills.description: Build AI pipelines with drag-and-drop components — models, tools, memory, and custom logic nodes.

skills.name: Flow REST API
skills.description: Every flow auto-generates a REST API endpoint for integration into any application or agent pipeline.

skills.name: MCP Server Export
skills.description: Expose any Langflow flow as a streamable MCP server — connect to Cursor, Claude, or any MCP client.
